sections.paragraph:
βρώσιμος, ον (Aeschyl., Prom. 479; ‘Anti-Atticist’ [Anecd. Gr. 84, 25]; SIG 624, 38; PSI 306, 7; StudPal XXII 75, 58; PGM 10, 1; Lev 19:23; Ezk 47:12; 2 Esdr 19:25) eatable τὶ β. anything to eat Lk 24:41.—DELG s.v. βιβρώσκω. M-M.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

StudPal StudPal = CWessely, Studien zur Paläographie und Papyrusurkunden—List 4

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 184
